About this song

P2
King Saha
🎤 About the Track
"P2" by King Saha is one of Uganda's biggest Luganda Pop hits of 2026, dominating radio airplay and streaming charts across East Africa. King Saha's smooth vocals and catchy hooks have made him a fan favourite.
